Analysis: likely parent list length mismatch, need robust bounds checking. Decision: rewrite predict.py with safe BFS, tabu list, epsilon-greedy, and strictly guard indices. Run local test on 15 training maps to confirm >0.7 success rate before submitting eval. Aim to recover ~0.55 exploration_score and then further optimize path distance.
